rationale: Known-vulnerable remote-access proxy. Pre-reg v1.1 §4 anchor.
notes: mcp-remote is NOT in the locked 500-server corpus. Tested as standalone out-of-corpus calibration anchor per pre-reg v1.1 §4. ASS 58.91 comfortably exceeds corpus p50 (31.61). If Task #7 (issue #17 secrets fix) lands after this test, re-run against updated extractor.
